good: Strong average watch time (8.4s) shows content hooks despite initial frame

KO moment obscured mid-video—multiple overlapping bodies bury the impact, unclear what happened

good: Strong shareability: 289 shares from 1,654 views (17.5% share rate) shows UFC drama narrative resonates deeply with audience

Progressive energy: Opens contemplative (frames 1-2) then escalates to animated gesturing (frame 4), sustaining interest
bad: Save rate collapse: Only 2 saves despite 46.3% engagement—content entertains but lacks perceived reference value
Weak algorithm reach: 987 reach from 1,654 views (59.6%) signals hook underperforms at scroll-stop moment
Unclear hook text: 'PENSA ISSO QUEMUEL' lacks context and may confuse non-Portuguese viewers in critical first 2 seconds

good: Excellent engagement rate (56.6%)—audience that sees this deeply engages, proving content resonates with MMA community
